sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46684" key="h(dumeli/fqoggos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠ-μελίφθογγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of honey-sweet voice</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Σιμωνίδης</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.571</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (acc. to Planudes).</sense> </entryFree>
